text.autoconfig.teleprompter.title: Teleprompter Configuration
text.autoconfig.teleprompter.option.xPos: Horizontal position of the text on screen.
text.autoconfig.teleprompter.option.yPos: Vertical position of the text on screen.
text.autoconfig.teleprompter.option.text: How solid the text is (255 is fully solid).
text.autoconfig.teleprompter.option.back: How dark the background box behind the text is.
text.autoconfig.teleprompter.option.scri: Add or edit your script lines here.
text.autoconfig.teleprompter.option.line: How many lines to display on screen at once.
